CustomField.description: Formula helps make it easy to decide to show the Quick Create Opp Panel
CustomField.formula: NOT (ISBLANK( Contact__c )) && NOT (ISBLANK( Account__c)) && ISBLANK( Opportunity__c) && LEFT(OwnerId,3) ="005"
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Formula helps make it easy to decide to show the Quick Create Opp Panel
CustomField.label: fxHasContactAccount
